identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

tenant_mobile.structure: Single column, stacked cards, large touch targets (min 44px)

reviewer_desktop.review_mode: Split Screen: Right Panel = Findings Form, Left Panel = Media Viewer

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-11 px-8 rounded-md

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-11 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 text-right

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add 'dir="rtl"' to the root html tag or body tag immediately.
Use 'date-fns' with Hebrew locale for all date formatting.
Ensure all flex containers that need directionality use 'flex-row' (which automatically reverses in RTL) or explicit 'flex-row-reverse' if visual order needs to oppose DOM order.
For the Reviewer Dashboard, create a layout with a fixed Right Sidebar.
For the Tenant Mobile view, hide the sidebar and use a Bottom Navigation Bar.
Use the 'hero_interior' image for the Login/Register page background with a heavy overlay.
Use 'construction_engineer' for the 'Expert Review' promo card.
Implement a 'Wizard' component for the inspection flow: Property Details -> Room Selection -> Media Upload -> Review.
Ensure all text inputs have 'text-right' class.
Use 'Sonner' for notifications, positioned 'top-center' or 'top-left' (since it's RTL, top-left is the 'end' side usually, or top-center is safe).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Always add hover states to interactive elements.
Avoid 'Inter' font; use 'Rubik' for headings and 'Heebo' for body.
Never use pure black (#000000); use Slate 900 (#0F172A).
